sales.update_draft_only: Only draft orders can be updated.
sales.delete_draft_only: Only draft orders can be deleted.
sales.confirm_draft_only: Only draft orders can be confirmed.
sales.stock_insufficient: Insufficient stock for product: :product. Available: :stock, Required: :required
sales.ship_confirmed_only: Only confirmed orders can be shipped.
sales.ship_success: Sales order marked as shipped successfully.

sales.deliver_success: Sales order marked as delivered successfully.
sales.cancel_error: Orders that are delivered or cancelled cannot be cancelled again.

sales.stock_out_success: Stock out created successfully from sales order.

purchase_order.receive_error_qty: Quantity received exceeds ordered quantity for product: :product
landing.hero_sub: Stop tracking stock with messy Excel sheets that are prone to errors. AgroWMS makes warehouse management simple, accurate, and accessible from anywhere.
landing.pain_sub: Thousands of businesses still face the same problems every day...
landing.pain_1_desc: Discrepancies between physical stock and records cause headaches. Customers complain about out-of-stock items even when the system says available.
landing.pain_2_desc: It takes hours to generate stock reports. When there's an urgent meeting, data is always outdated.
landing.pain_3_desc: Without batch & expiry tracking, expired goods are only discovered when it's too late.
landing.features_title: Everything You Need in One System
landing.features_sub: From stock tracking to financial reports, everything is integrated and easy to use.
landing.feature_1_desc: Monitor stock in real-time across all warehouses. Data is always up-to-date, wherever you are.
landing.feature_2_desc: Manage multiple warehouses in one dashboard. Supports zones, racks, and bin locations.
landing.feature_3_desc: Track batch numbers and expiration dates. Automated FIFO/FEFO for picking.
landing.feature_4_desc: Process orders to invoices in one flow. Integrated with warehouse stock.
landing.feature_5_desc: Transfer stock between warehouses with transit status tracking and approval workflows.
landing.feature_6_desc: Real-time dashboard, inventory aging reports, profit margin, and key exports.
landing.benefits_sub: More than just inventory software. AgroWMS helps you make data-driven decisions.
landing.cta_footer_sub: Join hundreds of businesses already using AgroWMS. Free to start.
landing.footer_desc: Modern Warehouse Management System to help businesses grow.
